description: A customer reports that a product they received is thicker than usual and causing issues in their process. A complaint record must be created and investigated.

nodes.task_description: Log the customer complaint, capturing the customer, product, batch number, and a detailed description of the issue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new complaint record in the CRM.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the retain sample for the complained-of batch and submit it to the QC lab for re-testing, specifically for viscosity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully requests the retain sample and creates a new lab testing order.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the complaint with the customer and inform them that an investigation is underway.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal acknowledgement email to the customer.
